Operation 'getDirections' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary 'Get directions' is too generic. Description lacks critical details about input format (coordinates), available profiles, and what the response contains. Added specificity about coordinate format, profile types, response structure (DirectionsResponse), and authentication requirement to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns routing directions between waypoints for the specified profile.
data.description_suggestion: Returns routing directions and turn-by-turn instructions between specified waypoints for the given routing profile (car, bike, foot, etc.). Accepts coordinates as comma-separated lat,lon pairs. Returns a DirectionsResponse object containing the route geometry, distance, duration, and detailed step-by-step directions. Requires authentication via API key.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get directions' is too generic. Description lacks critical details about input format (coordinates), available profiles, and what the response contains. Added specificity about coordinate format, profile types, response structure (DirectionsResponse), and authentication requirement to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'postalCodeSearch' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original description 'Locate details when only a postal code match is necessary' is vague and unclear about what action is performed and what is returned. Improved version clarifies the input (postal code), output (coordinates and address), and use case for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Locate details when only a postal code match is necessary.
data.summary_suggestion: Search location details by postal code
data.description_suggestion: Searches for location details using a postal code as the primary input. Returns geographic coordinates and address information for the specified postal code. Useful when only postal code information is available for geocoding.
data.reasoning: Original description 'Locate details when only a postal code match is necessary' is vague and unclear about what action is performed and what is returned. Improved version clarifies the input (postal code), output (coordinates and address), and use case for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getTimezone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Improved version clarifies that coordinates are the expected input and specifies what timezone information is returned (IANA timezone identifier and details). This helps AI agents understand exactly what to provide and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns timezone information for a given location.
data.description_suggestion: Returns timezone information for a specified geographic location. Accepts coordinates (latitude, longitude) as input and returns the IANA timezone identifier and related timezone details for that location.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about inputs and outputs. Improved version clarifies that coordinates are the expected input and specifies what timezone information is returned (IANA timezone identifier and details). This helps AI agents understand exactly what to provide and what to expect.
